response.justification: Candidate has strong full-stack and systems breadth with recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at Naver, plus prior high-throughput experience at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby. However, Python is absent from the listed skill set despite being a must-have, and the distributed-systems depth is demonstrated mainly in DLang rather than the role's primary stack. Worth a screening call to verify Python proficiency, distributed-systems depth at scale, and staff-level technical strategy experience.
strengths: Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code-generator work at Naver aligns with the AI-native engineering mindset
High-throughput distributed systems exposure at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby (millions of HTTP req/s, low-latency services)
Strong TypeScript/Node.js background plus craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: Python not listed in skills despite being a must-have for the role
Distributed-systems depth largely tied to DLang ecosystem; less evidence of Python-based large-scale architecture
Limited explicit evidence of staff-level technical strategy, stakeholder coordination, or on-call/incident leadership
